mano_cua.result_summary: 移动端布局下(375px)，点击或双击对话标题均直接关闭对话列表面板，不会进入编辑状态。桌面模式下点击标题可正常编辑。Bug 已确认复现：移动端无法编辑对话标题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Double-clicking on the conversation title in mobile mode closed the conversations panel and returned to the main chat view. This definitively confirms the bug: mobile mode conversation title editing not working. Single-click and double-click both close the panel without entering edit mode. Desktop mode works correctly.
